author: codex
scope: Reduced relation payload assertion_status=unknown by adding narrow deterministic delivered-status inference for static agency-role relations and source authorship publication-role relations.

constraints.mutation_path: deterministic assertion qualifier/test changes plus bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts materialize

subagents.finding_summary: Rebaselined 9569 unknown relation assertion statuses and recommended the publication_role prepared_by/authored_by source-to-entity slice as the safest next deterministic delivered-status rule. Also warned against broad planned/proposed/deferred/construction keyword rules.

rules.name: static_agency_role_relations
rules.guard: relation_family agency_role; relation_kind in employed_by, works_for, employee_of, works_at, president_of, is_president_of, general_counsel_of, department_head_of, has_officer, interim_president_of, or project_manager_of; subject and object are distinct entity records; description/display names have no future/proposed/former/uncertain tokens
negative_guards: unlisted agency-role kinds such as proposed_as
future/proposed/former/uncertain wording in relation description or endpoint display names

rules.name: source_authorship_publication_relations
rules.guard: relation_family publication_role; relation_kind prepared_by or authored_by; subject is source; object is entity; description has no future/proposed/uncertain tokens

verification.focused_tests: bun test packages/pipeline/test/records/assertion-qualifiers.test.ts: 23 pass, 0 fail, 84 expect() calls
verification.materialize: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts materialize completed; Materialized 93092/98102 submissions; retired skipped 243; SQLite FTS quick_check ok
verification.validate: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts validate: Issues 0; submissions 98102; canonical records 84040; wiki pages 7334

remaining_lanes: Relation assertion_status unknown remains 9328, dominated by metric_context 5672. Avoid broad metric-context delivered inference until a clear policy says relation existence equals delivered assertion.
Franklin identified possible operates_on_corridor proposed-starting descriptions, but warned broad proposed keywords have false positives such as current routes with proposed terminal swaps.

Next high-payoff lane should sample exact relation kind and endpoint-shape clusters under metric_context, agency_role, timeline_context, claim_context, funding_award, or corridor_scope and implement only narrow deterministic rules with negative guards.
